scripts.dev:all: (bun run dev & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap "kill $BACKEND_PID" EXIT INT TERM; bun run dev:web)
scripts.start:built: bun run build && (bun run --cwd packages/buddy start & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap "kill $BACKEND_PID" EXIT INT TERM; bun run --cwd packages/web preview --host --port 1420 --strictPort)
scripts.test: bun run test:parity && turbo run test
scripts.test:parity: bun run --cwd packages/buddy test:parity && bun run --cwd packages/web test:parity
